response.global_analysis: The audio features the bridge and final chorus of the song 'THERE IS A REASON', which phonetically differs from the verse lyrics provided in the JSON reference; I am prioritizing the audio as per the Golden Rule. The segment transitions into a dialogue between Airani Iofifteen and Tokino Sora. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio, and English translations maintain semantic continuity across natural pauses.

subtitles.original: Together...
subtitles.english: Together...

subtitles.original: 愛のために進むのは
subtitles.english: Moving forward for the sake of love,

subtitles.original: 君とここにいるから
subtitles.english: because I'm here with you.

subtitles.original: 僕だけが君を守るから
subtitles.english: Because I alone will protect you.

subtitles.original: 愛のために願うのは
subtitles.english: What I wish for for the sake of love

subtitles.original: そして共に生きること
subtitles.english: is for us to live together.

subtitles.original: ずっと...
subtitles.english: Forever...

subtitles.original: Believe...
subtitles.english: Believe...

subtitles.original: Together!
subtitles.english: Together!

subtitles.original: うっほ！よっぴー！お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Whoo! Yoppii! Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: やー、やった！今年も来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Wow, yay! Thank you for coming again this year!

subtitles.original: えー、どうもこんにちは。ときのそらです。
subtitles.english: Ehh, hello there. I'm Tokino Sora.

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします。こちら。えへへ。
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you. This way. Ehehe.

subtitles.original: やー、なんかね、バラード歌っちゃったね。
subtitles.english: Man, we really sang a ballad, didn't we?

subtitles.original: ねー。
subtitles.english: We did.

subtitles.original: より... 私すごい気になってるんだけど...
subtitles.english: More than that... I'm really curious...

subtitles.original: なんなん、この...？
subtitles.english: What's with this...?

subtitles.original: 宇宙、すっごい寒いから、これあったかいよ。
subtitles.english: Space is really cold, so this is warm.

subtitles.original: え、宇宙で焚き火なんてできるんだね。
subtitles.english: Eh, you can actually have a bonfire in space.

subtitles.original: できるよ、一応。
subtitles.english: You can, sort of.

subtitles.original: だって酸素があるってことだもん。
subtitles.english: I mean, it means there's oxygen.

subtitles.original: あ、でも酸素いるからさ、今、この、バリアあるから。
subtitles.english: Ah, but we need oxygen, so right now, there's a barrier.

subtitles.original: バリアあるからね。酸素ないから、
subtitles.english: Because there's a barrier. There's no oxygen,

subtitles.original: ないんだったら、もう燃えないじゃん。
subtitles.english: so if there wasn't, it wouldn't even burn.

subtitles.original: あ、ま、そう、そうだね。そうだね。
subtitles.english: Ah, well, yes, that's true. That's true.

subtitles.original: そう、あったかいよ、これ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's warm, this.

subtitles.original: よかった。なんか...
subtitles.english: I'm glad. It's just...

subtitles.original: MCでこんなにまったり焚き火の前で、こう、
subtitles.english: Having an MC segment so relaxedly in front of a bonfire,

subtitles.original: 夜の、なんか二人で喋っちゃうみたいな雰囲気で、
subtitles.english: in an atmosphere like two people chatting at night,

subtitles.original: やることないよ。ないから、ちょっと変な感じがする。
subtitles.english: we don't usually do this. So it feels a bit strange.

subtitles.original: あ、そうだね。普通にさ、ポーズの後にさ、
subtitles.english: Ah, you're right. Usually, after a pose,

subtitles.original: 「あー、やっと歌えたね！」っていう...じゃない？すぐ。
subtitles.english: "Ah, we finally sang it!" is what we'd say, right? Immediately.

subtitles.original: そうだけど、やっぱり今年のテーマ、もっとゆるいとか、
subtitles.english: Right, but as expected, this year's theme is more relaxed,

subtitles.original: 落ち着く雰囲気欲しいから、そのダンスとお歌の後に、
subtitles.english: and I wanted a calm atmosphere, so after the dance and song,

subtitles.original: ちょっとマイクをね、ちょっと置いて、ここに座ってるっていう。ね。
subtitles.english: we put the mics down and are just sitting here. Right.

subtitles.original: でもいいね。なんかまったりできるから、
subtitles.english: But it's nice. Since we can relax like this,

subtitles.original: ちょっとのんびりしてお喋りできる感じ、いいと思う。すごく。
subtitles.english: I think the feeling of chatting leisurely is great. Really.

subtitles.original: えー、やったやった。
subtitles.english: Ehh, yay yay.

subtitles.original: でね、今年、誕生日に二回目ぐらい言ったんだよね、毎年。
subtitles.english: And you know, this year, I've said this for my birthday about twice every year.

subtitles.original: そう、今年... ん？去年？去年と一昨年ってこと？
subtitles.english: Right, this year... Hm? Last year? You mean last year and the year before?

subtitles.original: そうそうそう。今年で、来年も来る？
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes. With this year, will you come next year too?

subtitles.original: え、もちろんもちろん！呼んでもらえればいつでも行くよ。
subtitles.english: Eh, of course, of course! If you invite me, I'll go anytime.

subtitles.original: おー、やったー！
subtitles.english: Oh, yay!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、決定です。よろしくお願いします。やったー！
subtitles.english: Then it's decided. Looking forward to it. Yay!

subtitles.original: そしたら、なんかもう、この去年と今年も結構ハンドマイクでやってるから...
subtitles.english: And then, well, since we've been using hand mics quite a bit last year and this year...

subtitles.original: そうだね、なんか結構...
subtitles.english: True, it's been quite a bit...

subtitles.original: 聴かせるみたいな感じの曲ばかりだったよね。そう。
subtitles.english: The songs were all the type that you just listen to, right? Yeah.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、来年はバリバリ踊ります？そしたら。
subtitles.english: Then, shall we dance vigorously next year? If so.

subtitles.original: 踊る！うおー！
subtitles.english: We'll dance! Whoo!

subtitles.original: いいね。踊り、やっぱりね、そら好き、踊るの。
subtitles.english: That's good. As expected, Sora likes dancing.

subtitles.original: 大好き！よっぴーは？
subtitles.english: I love it! How about you, Yoppii?

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き！ね、いいよねー。
subtitles.english: Love it, love it, love it! Right, it's great.

subtitles.original: いや、でもさ、なんか今年のさ、テーマ先も聞いてバラードだって聞いて、
subtitles.english: But, you know, hearing earlier that this year's theme is ballads,

subtitles.original: やっぱバラードのさ、全体をさ、ライブするのってすごい難しいなって私は思っちゃうの。
subtitles.english: I thought that doing a whole live show of ballads would be really difficult.

subtitles.original: え、そうなの？ほ！
subtitles.english: Eh, really? Oh!

subtitles.original: やっぱ演出とかもそうだけどさ、
subtitles.english: The production and everything, but...

subtitles.original: やっぱ私はいつも dance とかで見せるみたいなのやるから、
subtitles.english: since I always do things that show off with dancing and such,

subtitles.original: バラードで挑戦するのってすごいなって思ってた。
subtitles.english: I thought it's amazing to challenge yourself with ballads.

subtitles.original: あー、そうだね。でもなんか自分にとっては、
subtitles.english: Ah, I see. But for me,

subtitles.original: バラードが一番声に似合うから。
subtitles.english: ballads suit my voice the best.

subtitles.original: そう、なんか、もっと見せたいなっては思ってて。
subtitles.english: Yeah, so I was thinking I wanted to show that more.

subtitles.original: あー、ね。
subtitles.english: Ah, right.

subtitles.original: そう... あ、ほら見える、いっぱい！うー！
subtitles.english: Right... Oh, look, I can see so many! Ooh!

subtitles.original: きれい！宇宙。宇宙に来ました。
subtitles.english: Beautiful! Space. We've come to space.

subtitles.original: あの、去年もちょっと行っ...
subtitles.english: Um, last year we went a bit...

subtitles.original: 一応は宇宙に行ったんだけど、
subtitles.english: We did go to space,

subtitles.original: こんなにあまり見えないかもしれない、それ。だから、
subtitles.english: but it might not have looked like this as much. So,

subtitles.original: 今年はちゃんと宇宙に行きたいです！
subtitles.english: this year I wanted to go to space properly!

subtitles.original: わー、すごい！宇宙来ました、二人で。すごい！
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! We've come to space together. Amazing!

subtitles.original: あ、きれい、本当に！おー、
subtitles.english: Ah, it's really beautiful! Oh,

subtitles.original: なんかねーさんと似合うんじゃない？
subtitles.english: doesn't it suit you, big sister?

subtitles.original: 本当？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: そう、なんかイメージカラーが青だからね。
subtitles.english: Well, since your image color is blue.

subtitles.original: ほら、青のステージもこっちも。
subtitles.english: Look, the blue stage and here too.

subtitles.original: え、いいなー、かわいいなー。へへへ。
subtitles.english: Eh, it's nice, it's cute. Hehehe.
